provider: The Education University of Hong Kong 2026/27 Undergraduate Programme Course Lists

supplements.evidenceNote: The official 2026/27 Major Course List and Integrated Minor Course List publish 23 unique confirmed codes and titles: fourteen named Major courses, one Major Interdisciplinary Course, three Cross-Faculty Core components and five Integrated Minor courses. The Cross-Faculty Core description explicitly assigns 1 credit point to each component; the other public course rows do not publish per-course credit points or a recommended year/semester pattern, so those fields remain unknown. The Programme page confirms a 69-cp Major domain including Practicum, a 15-cp Integrated Minor and a 6-cp Final Year Project, but the public course lists do not identify Practicum or Final Year Project course codes. Those missing components are not invented, and this published-code subset does not assert graduation completion or professional accreditation.
